title: Implement manager dashboard summary and priorities backend contract
description: Extend manager summary endpoint to expose deterministic KPI + priorities feed required by native dashboard and preserve manager role/auth envelope behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Summary endpoint returns KPI block and priorities array with deterministic fields
Provider role and invalid token requests keep stable auth-session-v1 guardrail envelopes
Property API tests cover summary payload, priorities ordering, and auth/role guardrails
